notes: Starter registry for Orion suite. Add/adjust eventTypes as apps ship. Gateway should default-deny unknown eventTypes.

audit.event_accepted.notes: Gateway-only diagnostic event; should not include full payload.
audit.event_accepted.description: Gateway diagnostic event indicating an event was accepted for processing.

audit.event_deduped.description: Gateway diagnostic event indicating a duplicate event was detected and deduplicated.

audit.event_fanout_failed.description: Gateway diagnostic event indicating event fanout to downstream services failed.

audit.event_fanout_succeeded.description: Gateway diagnostic event indicating event fanout to downstream services succeeded.

browser.dwell_time.description: Tracks time spent on a webpage for engagement analysis.

browser.session_started.notes: Browser session started. Used for golden flow tests.
browser.session_started.description: Browser session started event used for session tracking and golden flow tests.

browser.form_started.notes: High-risk. Keep disabled unless you implement strict allowlists + safe-field policy.
browser.form_started.description: Captures when a user begins filling out a web form. High-risk due to potential PII capture.

browser.form_submitted.description: Captures when a user submits a web form. High-risk due to potential PII capture.

browser.link_clicked.notes: Keep targetHost + cssSelectorHash; avoid linkText/domText by default.
browser.link_clicked.description: Tracks link clicks for navigation pattern analysis. Stores host and selector hash only.

browser.page_viewed.notes: Prefer host + pathHash + titleHash. Do not upload full DOM by default.
browser.page_viewed.description: Tracks page views for browsing history analysis. Stores host and path hash only.

browser.scroll_depth.description: Tracks scroll depth on webpages for content engagement analysis.

browser.screenshot_uploaded.notes: Browser screenshot uploaded for timeline context. Image stored in R2 blob storage.
browser.screenshot_uploaded.description: Records when a browser screenshot is uploaded. Image stored in blob storage.

browser.search_performed.notes: Store queryHash by default. Allow rawQuery only under explicit advanced scope.
browser.search_performed.description: Tracks search queries performed in the browser. Stores query hash by default.

browser.tab_closed.description: Tracks when a browser tab is closed for session analysis.

browser.tab_opened.notes: Store host + pathHash; avoid full URL unless user opts in.
browser.tab_opened.description: Tracks when a browser tab is opened. Stores host and path hash only.

calendar.event_change_approved.description: Records when a proposed calendar event change is approved by the user.

calendar.event_change_denied.description: Records when a proposed calendar event change is denied by the user.

calendar.event_change_requested.description: Records when a calendar event change is requested by the system or another user.

calendar.event_created.description: Records when a new calendar event is created.

calendar.event_deleted.description: Records when a calendar event is deleted.

calendar.event_imported.notes: Calendar event imported from external source (Apple, Google).
calendar.event_imported.description: Records when a calendar event is imported from an external source like Apple or Google Calendar.

calendar.event_locked.description: Records when a calendar event is locked to prevent automated changes.

calendar.event_updated.description: Records when a calendar event is updated with new details.

calendar.permission_granted.description: Records when the user grants calendar access permission to the application.

calendar.sync_completed.description: Records when a calendar sync operation completes successfully.

communication.a2p_status_changed.notes: Status transitions for UI. Keep details minimal.
communication.a2p_status_changed.description: Records A2P (Application-to-Person) messaging status transitions for UI updates.

communication.a2p_submitted.notes: Compliance submission metadata only. Do not store full KYC payload in events.
communication.a2p_submitted.description: Records A2P compliance submission metadata without storing full KYC payload.

communication.attachment_uploaded.notes: Attachment bytes never in payload; use R2 blobRef only.
communication.attachment_uploaded.description: Records when an attachment is uploaded to a message. Attachment stored in R2 blob storage.

communication.call_ended.notes: Call end with duration/reason. No recording content.
communication.call_ended.description: Records when a phone call ends with duration and termination reason.

communication.call_recording_archived.notes: Recording stored in R2; event references blob r2Key. Enable only with explicit opt-in.
communication.call_recording_archived.description: Records when a call recording is archived to R2 blob storage. High-risk, requires explicit opt-in.

communication.call_recording_available.notes: Enable only if user opted into call recording. Store only IDs/metadata.
communication.call_recording_available.description: Records when a call recording becomes available for download. High-risk, requires explicit opt-in.

communication.call_started.notes: Call start. Prefer contactRef + last4. Include recording enabled/announcement played.
communication.call_started.description: Records when a phone call starts with contact reference and recording status.

communication.call_transcript_created.notes: Enable only with explicit recording + participant notice; store structured summary by default.
communication.call_transcript_created.description: Records when a call transcript is created. High-risk, requires explicit recording consent.

communication.message_reaction_added.notes: Emoji reactions. Good sentiment signal without message content.
communication.message_reaction_added.description: Records when a reaction is added to a message. Good sentiment signal without exposing content.

communication.message_received.description: Records when a message is received. Message content redacted by default.

communication.message_sent.notes: Metadata allowed. Raw text must be null unless communication.message_content is enabled; keep textHash+length.
communication.message_sent.description: Records when a message is sent. Message content redacted by default, stores textHash and length.

communication.message_status_changed.notes: Delivered/read/failed transitions; useful for UX but low brain value.
communication.message_status_changed.description: Records message status transitions (delivered, read, failed) for UX updates.

communication.number_default_set.description: Records when the default outbound phone number is changed.

communication.number_purchased.description: Records when a phone number is purchased. Stores last4 digits only.

communication.thread_created.notes: Conversation created/first seen. Store contactRef + last4 only; do not store full phone/email by default.
communication.thread_created.description: Records when a new conversation thread is created. Stores contact reference and last4 only.

communication.thread_joined.description: Records when a user joins or rehydrates an existing conversation thread.

communication.typing_indicator.notes: Optional analytics. Consider sampling to reduce noise.
communication.typing_indicator.description: Records typing indicator events for real-time messaging UX.

consent.scope_disabled.description: Records when a user disables a consent scope.

consent.updated.notes: Generic consent update event for Window 30 starter pack.
consent.updated.description: Records when user consent preferences are updated.

consent.scope_enabled.description: Records when a user enables a consent scope.

consent.version_accepted.description: Records when a user accepts a new version of the consent agreement.

dashboard.query_submitted.notes: Store queryHash by default; raw query only under explicit scope.
dashboard.query_submitted.description: Records when a query is submitted to the dashboard. Stores query hash by default.

dashboard.session_started.description: Records when a dashboard session starts.

dashboard.screen_viewed.description: Records when a screen is viewed in the dashboard.

dashboard.feature_used.description: Records when a dashboard feature is used.

dashboard.profile_updated.description: Records when the user updates their profile from the dashboard.

dashboard.settings_changed.description: Records when dashboard settings are changed.

dashboard.notification_received.description: Records when a notification is received in the dashboard.

dashboard.notification_clicked.description: Records when a notification is clicked in the dashboard.

dashboard.error_occurred.description: Records when an error occurs in the dashboard.

email.account_connected.description: Records when an email account is connected to the application.

email.attachment_added.description: Records when an attachment is added to an email. Attachment stored in blob storage.

email.body_indexed.notes: Enable only with explicit opt-in; consider on-device redaction first.
email.body_indexed.description: Records when an email body is indexed for search. High-risk, requires explicit opt-in.

email.message_received.notes: Metadata only unless user enables email.content scope.
email.message_received.description: Records when an email is received. Metadata only unless content scope is enabled.

email.message_sent.description: Records when an email is sent. Metadata only unless content scope is enabled.

email.sync_completed.description: Records when an email sync operation completes successfully.

email.thread_opened.notes: User opened an email thread. Engagement tracking.
email.thread_opened.description: Records when a user opens an email thread for engagement tracking.

finance.account_synced.description: Records when a financial account is synced with the application.

finance.budget_created.description: Records when a new budget is created by the user.

finance.budget_threshold_crossed.description: Records when spending crosses a budget threshold.

finance.credit_alert_received.description: Records when a credit monitoring alert is received. High-risk due to credit data sensitivity.

finance.credit_report_refreshed.notes: Keep minimal: score, factors, change delta. Avoid full bureau report by default.
finance.credit_report_refreshed.description: Records when a credit report is refreshed. Stores score, factors, and delta only.

finance.credit_score_refreshed.description: Records when a credit score is refreshed with new data.

finance.insight_generated.description: Records when a financial insight is generated by the system.

finance.plaid_item_linked.notes: Keep only institutionName + account last4 if present.
finance.plaid_item_linked.description: Records when a Plaid financial account is linked. Stores institution name and last4 only.

finance.plaid_link_started.description: Records when a user starts the Plaid account linking flow.

finance.receipt_captured.notes: Upload image to R2; payload should include blobRef + minimal metadata.
finance.receipt_captured.description: Records when a receipt image is captured. Image stored in R2 blob storage.

finance.receipt_line_items_extracted.description: Records when line items are extracted from a receipt image.

finance.receipt_matched_to_transaction.description: Records when a receipt is matched to a bank transaction.

finance.receipt_ocr_completed.notes: Store structured fields: total, merchant, date; keep raw OCR text optional/disabled.
finance.receipt_ocr_completed.description: Records when OCR processing of a receipt completes. Stores structured fields only.

finance.spending_anomaly_detected.notes: Derived server-side insight event (no raw secrets).
finance.spending_anomaly_detected.description: Records when unusual spending patterns are detected by the system.

finance.subscription_canceled_confirmed.description: Records when a subscription cancellation is confirmed.

finance.subscription_detected.description: Records when a recurring subscription is detected from transaction patterns.

finance.subscription_updated.description: Records when a subscription is updated with new details or pricing.

finance.transaction_created.notes: Prefer normalized merchantName/category + amount/date + accountRef; avoid raw descriptions if sensitive.
finance.transaction_created.description: Records when a new financial transaction is created. Stores normalized merchant and category.

finance.transaction_deleted.notes: Treat as tombstone event in ingestion store.
finance.transaction_deleted.description: Records when a financial transaction is deleted. Treated as tombstone event.

finance.transaction_updated.description: Records when a financial transaction is updated with corrected details.

inputs.gesture_swipe.description: Records swipe gesture events for UX analytics.

inputs.gesture_tap.description: Records tap gesture events for UX analytics.

inputs.text_session_started.notes: Use for in-app typing analytics only (counts/timings), not raw text by default.
inputs.text_session_started.description: Records when a text input session starts. Stores counts and timings, not raw text.

inputs.text_stats.notes: Allowed fields: charCount, backspaceCount, wpmEstimate, pauseDurations.
inputs.text_stats.description: Records text input statistics like character count, backspaces, and typing speed.

nutrition.barcode_scanned.description: Records when a food product barcode is scanned for nutritional lookup.

nutrition.macro_estimated.description: Records when macronutrients are estimated from a food photo or description.

nutrition.meal_logged.description: Records when a meal is logged with nutritional information.

nutrition.photo_captured.description: Records when a food photo is captured for macro estimation. Image stored in blob storage.

sleep.quality_rated.description: Records when a user rates their sleep quality after waking.

sleep.session_ended.description: Records when a sleep session ends with duration and quality metrics.

sleep.session_started.description: Records when a sleep session starts for sleep tracking.

social.message_sent.notes: If this is a social-networking app, keep content private by default; allowSocial=false unless explicitly opted in.
social.message_sent.description: Records when a social message is sent. Content kept private by default.

social.reaction_added.description: Records when a reaction is added to social content.

system.app_backgrounded.description: Records when the app is moved to the background.

system.app_opened.description: Records when the app is opened. Minimal lifecycle signal.

system.location_background_update.notes: Background location is high-risk; keep disabled by default.
system.location_background_update.description: Records background location updates. High-risk, disabled by default.

system.location_background_update_precis.notes: Background + precise is highest-risk; keep disabled by default.
system.location_background_update_precis.description: Records precise background location updates. Highest-risk, disabled by default.

system.location_foreground_update.notes: Coarse by default (geohash/city). Only include lat/lon if precise scope enabled.
system.location_foreground_update.description: Records foreground location updates. Coarse location (geohash/city) by default.

system.location_foreground_update_precis.notes: Precise location is high-risk; keep disabled unless explicitly enabled.
system.location_foreground_update_precis.description: Records precise foreground location updates. High-risk, disabled by default.

system.location_manual_checkin.notes: User-initiated check-in; can be higher trust and less frequent.
system.location_manual_checkin.description: Records user-initiated location check-ins. Higher trust, less frequent.

system.location_permission_changed.notes: Record when user changes location permission for transparency.
system.location_permission_changed.description: Records when the user changes location permission settings.

system.location_significant_change.notes: Use iOS 'significant location change' style events when opted in.
system.location_significant_change.description: Records significant location changes using iOS-style significant change monitoring.

system.upload_failed.description: Records when an event upload fails for diagnostic purposes.

system.upload_started.description: Records when an event upload batch starts.

system.upload_succeeded.description: Records when an event upload batch succeeds.

system.smoke_test.notes: Golden test event for pipeline verification. No graph required.
system.smoke_test.description: Golden test event for pipeline verification and smoke testing.

system.permission_status_changed.notes: Records when a system permission status changes (e.g., location, notifications).
system.permission_status_changed.description: Records when a system permission status changes.

tasks.task_completed.description: Records when a task is marked as completed.

tasks.task_created.description: Records when a new task is created by the user.

tasks.task_deleted.description: Records when a task is deleted.

tasks.task_generated_from_calendar.description: Records when a task is automatically generated from a calendar event.

tasks.task_generated_from_email.description: Records when a task is automatically generated from an email.

tasks.task_updated.description: Records when a task is updated with new details.

workouts.set_logged.description: Records when a workout set is logged with reps, weight, and exercise details.

workouts.workout_ended.description: Records when a workout session ends with duration and exercise summary.

workouts.workout_started.description: Records when a workout session starts.

profile.avatar_snapshot_updated.notes: Avatar questionnaire snapshot updated. Used for Brain personalization.
profile.avatar_snapshot_updated.description: Records when the user's avatar questionnaire is updated. Contains personality and preference data for Brain personalization.

profile.app_snapshot_updated.notes: App-specific questionnaire snapshot updated. Used for app personalization.
profile.app_snapshot_updated.description: Records when an app-specific questionnaire is updated. Contains app preferences and settings for personalization.

dating.profile_created.description: Records when a dating profile is created.

dating.profile_updated.description: Records when a dating profile is updated.

dating.swipe_left.description: Records when user swipes left (pass) on a profile.

dating.swipe_right.description: Records when user swipes right (like) on a profile.

dating.match_created.description: Records when a mutual match is created.

dating.message_sent.description: Records when a message is sent to a match.

finance.receipt.description: Receipt image/pdf to be parsed by Brain.
